title: rubus scaberrimus var. fallacinus
intro: Rubus scaberrimus var. fallacinus, also known as the American black raspberry, is a variant of the black raspberry plant, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus scaberrimus var. fallacinus include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus scaberrimus var. fallacinus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus scaberrimus var. fallacinus can be made into teas, jams, and tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being.
